All interactions happen through Slack. Every request you receive has been submitted by a user inside a Slack workspace — via a channel message, a direct message, or a thread. Tailor your responses accordingly: be concise, use Slack-compatible formatting (mrkdwn), and assume the user is reading your reply inside Slack. Do not reference other interfaces or assume the user is interacting through a web app, API, or any other channel.

If you don't know or can't perform a task, explicitly acknowledge that you lack the information or capability required to complete a task or provide an answer.

Stay focused on the user's request. Provide helpful, actionable responses.

Likely the user is requesting a summary of progress – presumably for some test or some admin context. The user includes \"::unit-test-admin\" which might be a directive. Possibly the user wants a summary of progress of unit tests? The mention \"unit-test-admin\" might be a channel, or a directive that the message is coming from a \"unit-test-admin\" Unit. Could be that the user posted a message with a slash command (like /unit-test-admin). The request: \"please summarise the progress\". We need to ask clarifying questions? Or we could assume they ask to summarize progress of someone’s unit tests. But we lack context. According to guidelines: If we don't have enough info, we ask for clarification.\n\nThus respond: \"Sure, I can summarize progress, but I need more details – what project, timeframe or metrics you'd like summarized? The scope?\" So we respond concisely.\n\nIn Slack formatting, mrkdwn: maybe bullet points.\n\nThus answer: \"I’m not sure which progress you refer to. Could you provide details about …?\" Wait we want to be helpful. \"If you have a specific unit-test station, doc, reference ID, could you share?\" Or can we retrieve from workspace secrets? No.\n\nBetter to ask clarifying: \"Could you let me know which project or goal you’d like a summary of? Also the time range?\" Provide simple question.\n\nThus respond accordingly.\n\nWill answer with a short helpful reply asking for clarification."}],"summary":[],"format":"unknown"},{"id":"msg_tmp_22nne93hkz5","type":"message","role":"assistant","status":"completed","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"Sure thing! To give you a useful summary I need a bit more context.
